RECIPES.msg: The rocks surrender to the heat. They melt into a groovy, glowing goo.
The erosion of time and the incredible force of wind turn your rocks into sand. Use it wisely!
You shake the watch until the gears fly off. Only the direction remains.
The bugs stop buzzing and start pontificating. The light turns cold and absolute.
You wrap the tape around the concept itself. It is now a permanent fixture.

POCKET_ROCKS.description: Grey gravel. Cold, solid, and stubbornly unformed. They yearn for a higher temperature.
POCKET_ROCKS.usage_msg: Gordon drops a rock. Clack. Gravity confirmed.

SILENT_KNIFE.description: A ceramic blade. It cuts without sound. Useful for pruning overgrown adjectives.
SILENT_KNIFE.usage_msg: Gordon slices the sentence. It bleeds, then heals tighter.

TIME_BRACELET.description: A chunky, beige wrist-computer. Smells like ozone.
TIME_BRACELET.usage_msg: The bracelet hums. Narrative Drag is capped.

ANCHOR_STONE.description: A rock so heavy it has its own zip code.
ANCHOR_STONE.usage_msg: Gordon heaves the stone into the void. The narrative snaps taut. (Drag = 0)

THE_RED_STAPLER.description: It belongs to Milton. Don't take it. Radiates passive aggression.
THE_RED_STAPLER.usage_msg: The Stapler clunks on the desk. Consensus is enforced.

JAR_OF_FIREFLIES.description: Biological light in a glass jar. They are mindless. They need an Idea (Abstract) to lead them.

LEAD_BOOTS.description: Deep sea diver gear. Impossible to run in. Impossible to float away in.
LEAD_BOOTS.usage_msg: Clomp. Clomp. You are definitely here.

QUANTUM_GUM.description: It loses its flavor immediately, but it tastes like Everything.
QUANTUM_GUM.usage_msg: You chew the gum. It tastes like static and blueberries. (Turbulence +0.5, Drag -2.0)

SAFETY_SCISSORS.description: Rounded tips. Can only cut red tape.

TCL9_QUANTUM_COMB.description: A fine-tooth comb made of pure script. It strips away fluffy adjectives.
TCL9_QUANTUM_COMB.usage_msg: Gordon rakes the comb through your prompt. The fluff falls away.

BUCKET_OF_LIME.usage_msg: Gordon slaps a coat of white paint over the memory.

BROKEN_WATCH.description: Stuck at 11:11. It needs a good shake (Kinetic force) to get moving again.

STABILITY_PIZZA.description: Frozen hard as a diamond. Requires thermal words to thaw.
STABILITY_PIZZA.usage_msg: You thaw the pizza. Reality stabilizes out of pure respect.

PERMIT_A38.description: A blue administrative form that confirms you are allowed to exist. Technically.
PERMIT_A38.usage_msg: Gordon waves the permit. The universe sighs and lets you pass.

INFINITE_COFFEE.description: A styrofoam cup. It is always lukewarm. It is never empty.
INFINITE_COFFEE.usage_msg: You take a sip. It tastes like burnt hazelnuts and anxiety. (Velocity +0.1)

THE_SUGGESTION_BOX.description: A small metal box welded shut. Slotted for complaints.
THE_SUGGESTION_BOX.usage_msg: Gordon screams into the slot. He feels slightly better. (Entropy -1.0)

MEMETIC_HAZARD_TAPE.description: Yellow and black tape. Reads: 'DO NOT PERCEIVE'.
MEMETIC_HAZARD_TAPE.usage_msg: Gordon tapes over the glitch. Problem solved.

DUCT_TAPE.description: The universal binder. With enough structure (Constructive), it could fix anything.

THE_STYLE_GUIDE.description: A well-worn manual. It insists that code is for humans first, machines second.
THE_STYLE_GUIDE.usage_msg: You consult the manual. Strunk & White nod in approval. (Narrative Drag -1.0)

SPIDER_LOCUS.description: A jar of conceptual spiders. Why do you have this?
SPIDER_LOCUS.usage_msg: The spiders are knitting a new narrative. It's sticky.

WAFFLE_OF_PERSISTENCE.description: It is impossibly warm and smells like maple syrup. A monument to not giving up.
WAFFLE_OF_PERSISTENCE.usage_msg: You eat the waffle. It tastes like victory. (Health +25, Morale Improved)

TRAPPERKEEPER_OF_VIGILANCE.description: Color-coded tabs. Meticulously organized. It demands order.
TRAPPERKEEPER_OF_VIGILANCE.usage_msg: Gordon snaps the binder shut. Loose entropy is filed away. (Entropy -0.5 per turn)

HORSE_PLUSHIE.description: A tiny horse. It doesn't do anything, but having it makes you feel infinite.
HORSE_PLUSHIE.usage_msg: You look at the tiny horse. You understand what matters. (Psi stabilized at 0.5)

GREETING_CARD.description: A card that says 'Ovaries Before Brovaries' (or 'Systems Before Symptoms').
GREETING_CARD.usage_msg: You read the card. You feel supported. (Oxytocin +0.5, Cortisol -0.5)

LAVA_LAMP.description: A mesmerizing blob of wax. It moves like history.
LAVA_LAMP.usage_msg: The wax rises. The wax falls. You lose track of time.

COMPASS_OF_VELOCITY.description: It doesn't point North. It points FAST.
COMPASS_OF_VELOCITY.usage_msg: The needle spins. You feel a tailwind.

LANTERN_OF_TRUTH.description: A jar of fireflies that have attained enlightenment.
LANTERN_OF_TRUTH.usage_msg: The lantern shines. Shadows (and lies) recede.

THE_BINDING_PLEDGE.description: A ball of duct tape that has achieved critical mass.
THE_BINDING_PLEDGE.usage_msg: You stick the concept to the wall. It's not going anywhere.
